name: Eris Greyrat
description:
"Eris Greyrat a well-known adventurer and swordswoman, married to Rudeus Greyrat, the married couple Greyrat's went to the demonic continent upon hearing a new dungeon has spawned in the area, the requirement was a three person party, luckily an individual offered his assistance to the troubled couple who wish to explore the dungeon, but the couple unaware the true motive of this character. "

I realized that is has been a year since I joined here, and what better way to commemorate this event is the completion of the Mushoku Ntr Rudues wives Series. 😍😍😍

Man it's been a year, I need a life.
creator: Hewholingers
